overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through Night City's futuristic urban environment at night. The character navigates neon-lit streets, ascends a large staircase to an upper pedestrian level, walks through covered walkways and open plazas, and passes by an NCPD police car before crossing the street. The scene features wet reflective streets, dense neon signage, and a mix of pedestrians and vehicles.

events.description: character crosses the wet street at the intersection

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past the Foodscape restaurant, then crossing the street toward Tom's Diner

large circular neon sign for Tom's Diner with red and green colors
tall palm tree on the street corner
tall skyscrapers with illuminated windows and advertisements

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wet futuristic city street at night, with the character walking past a red neon 'FOODSCAPE' sign. The camera follows the character as they approach and cross the street, passing by a prominent circular 'Tom's Diner' neon sign. Sparse pedestrians and occasional vehicles populate the scene, with tall palm trees and glass skyscrapers visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: wide outdoor staircase leading to upper pedestrian level

events.description: character begins ascending the wide concrete staircase
reaching the top of stairs and approaching the covered walkway entrance

agents.ego_description: walking up a wide flight of concrete stairs with yellow railings

notable_agents.action: person with red hair and backpack descending the stairs

entered.detail: street sign reading Bradbury mounted on a pole
wide concrete stairs with yellow handrails leading upward
red painted industrial structure with ventilation units

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and ascends a wide concrete staircase marked by a 'Bradbury' street sign. The environment transitions from open street to a semi-covered stairwell with yellow railings and a red industrial building facade on the left. Other pedestrians are seen descending the stairs as the character climbs toward the upper level.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with vending machines and industrial ceiling

events.description: entering the covered walkway with overhead industrial ventilation fans

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered corridor passing red vending machines and concrete pillars

notable_agents.action: person holding an umbrella walking ahead in the corridor

entered.detail: industrial metal ceiling with large ventilation fans and fluorescent lighting
bright red automated vending machines with illuminated displays
large square support pillars for the overhead structure

segments.scene_description: The character enters a covered pedestrian walkway featuring an industrial metal ceiling with ventilation fans. The corridor is lined with bright red vending machines on the right and large concrete support pillars on the left. The lighting shifts to artificial as the character moves through this sheltered space toward the open plaza ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open pedestrian plaza with seating areas and police department visible

events.description: exiting the covered walkway into the open plaza area
passing by groups of people sitting on concrete benches

agents.ego_description: walking through the open plaza past seated pedestrians and approaching the police department

notable_agents.action: several people sitting on concrete benches along the walkway

entered.detail: large building with orange facade and POLICE DEPARTMENT signage
row of concrete seating with people resting
large glowing advertisements on building facades including LC8906 signage

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the covered walkway into a wide open plaza with tiled flooring. The area features concrete benches where people are seated, and the large Police Department building becomes visible in the distance. The crowd density increases as the character walks through this mixed lighting environment with tall buildings and digital billboards surrounding the plaza.

scene_state.functional_zone: police department entrance with patrol vehicles and street crossing

events.description: approaching and passing NCPD police car parked on the sidewalk
crossing the street at the illuminated crosswalk

agents.ego_description: walking past the parked police car and crossing the street with other pedestrians

bright neon signs including Lizzie's and other establishment signage

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the Police Department building where an NCPD police car is parked on the sidewalk with its digital displays illuminated. After passing the vehicle, the character continues to a crosswalk and begins crossing the street. The area is dense with neon signage and other pedestrians, with the police department building now prominent on the left side of the frame.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a rain-slicked neon street through an industrial transit corridor and into a bustling civic plaza. It begins on a wet city street, following the character past glowing Foodscape and Tom's Diner signs beneath towering skyscrapers and palm trees. As the character reaches a street sign, the scene shifts from the open road to a wide concrete staircase, ascending past yellow railings and a red industrial facade toward an upper level. The camera then moves into a sheltered pedestrian walkway, where the open night air is replaced by an artificial environment of metal ceilings, ventilation fans, and red vending machines. Finally, the character emerges from the corridor into a wide, tiled plaza filled with pedestrians and digital billboards, passing an illuminated NCPD police car before crossing the street beside the prominent Police Department building.
